# Bank Import CSV Parsers

> A PHP library providing a generic CSV parsing engine with bank-specific implementations (WMMC, BCR, ING, RBC) for importing banking and credit card statements into the ksf_bank_import system. Uses a polymorphic parser hierarchy with standardized entity output and ContactData integration via ksfraser/contact-dto.

The library follows PSR-4 autoloading under the `Parsers\` namespace. Each bank parser extends `GenericCsvParser` (abstract base) with minimal overrides for header aliases and column mappings. Payee data is standardized via `\Ksfraser\Contact\DTO\ContactData` from the `ksfraser/contact-dto` package.

## Documentation

- [README](README.md): Project overview, installation, usage examples, and test coverage
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Technical requirements, coding standards, and development principles
- [Product Requirements](Project%20Docs/PRD.md): Executive summary, user stories, scope, and risk analysis
- [Functional Requirements](Project%20Docs/FRD.md): Detailed functional requirements (FR-001 through FR-005)
- [Architecture Blueprint](Project%20Docs/Project_Architecture_Blueprint.md): Technology stack, component design, class hierarchy, and AGENTS.md compliance
- [Implementation Plan](Project%20Docs/Implementation_Plan.md): Phased implementation with task completion status
- [Requirements Traceability Matrix](Project%20Docs/RTM.md): Mapping of requirements to files, functions, and tests

## Core Source

- [GenericCsvParser](src/Parsers/GenericCsvParser.php): Abstract base parser with CSV engine, header detection, column mapping, and mapToContactField()
- [WmmcCsvParser](src/Parsers/WmmcCsvParser.php): Walmart Mastercard CSV parser
- [BcrCsvParser](src/Parsers/BcrCsvParser.php): BCR Romania CSV parser
- [IngCsvParser](src/Parsers/IngCsvParser.php): ING Romania CSV parser
- [RbcCsvParser](src/Parsers/RbcCsvParser.php): RBC Canada CSV parser

## Entities

- [Transaction](src/Entities/Transaction.php): Transaction entity with ContactData payee (maps to bi_transactions)
- [Statement](src/Entities/Statement.php): Bank statement entity (maps to bi_statements)
- [BankAccount](src/Entities/BankAccount.php): OFX-aligned bank account model
- [Balance](src/Entities/Balance.php): OFX-aligned balance model
- [Currency](src/Entities/Currency.php): Currency handling

## Configuration

- [composer.json](composer.json): Composer package definition and dependencies (ksfraser/contact-dto ^0.1.0)
- [parser.json](parser.json): Parser metadata for core bank import system integration
- [phpunit.xml](phpunit.xml): PHPUnit test configuration with coverage settings

- [LICENSE](LICENSE.md): MIT license
- [Payee (deprecated)](src/Entities/Payee.php): Deprecated stub extending ContactData for backward compatibility
